title: mip-heuristics: a primal heuristics suite for HiGHS
description: Open-source primal heuristics suite integrated into HiGHS v1.14.0 via a patched build. Implements FPR (Fix, Propagate, Repair), LocalMIP, Scylla (PDLP-based feasibility pump), FeasibilityJump, LP-guided FPR, and a Thompson-sampling adaptive portfolio. Features epoch-gated and opportunistic parallel workers. Validated on the PLATO mipfeas benchmark (233 MIPLIB 2017 instances, 600s).
